info.title: Product Core API Contract (v1)
info.description: External-facing API contract for product-core service

tags.name: Product Offerings
tags.description: Manage product offerings and their slices

get.summary: Get a Rights Profile Template by ID

value.name: Perpetual Access — Full Rights
value.description: Standard perpetual access with full online and download rights

value.name: Perpetual Access — Full Rights (Updated)
value.description: Updated standard perpetual access with full online and download rights

value.message: A template with name 'Perpetual Access — Full Rights' already exists

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

data.name: Perpetual Access — Full Rights
data.description: Standard perpetual access with full online and download rights

perpetual-full-rights.summary: Perpetual access with full usage rights

value.name: Perpetual Access — Full Rights
value.description: Standard perpetual access with full online and download rights

409.description: Template code or name already exists

value.name: Perpetual Access — Full Rights
value.description: Standard perpetual access with full online and download rights

422.description: Content validation expired, not successful, or rights config invalid

patch.summary: Transition a Rights Profile Template status

409.description: Invalid transition, same status, or version conflict

value.message: Template is already in Active status
Version conflict on template 3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6 — reload and retry
Template 3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6 status updated from Draft to Active

get.summary: Render a Rights Profile Template — schema merged with stored values
get.description: Mode SALES: each field's editable reflects the governance flag stored in the template (editable=true means an offering may override that field). Mode ADMIN: all fields editable=true regardless of stored flag.

400.description: Invalid mode — must be SALES or ADMIN

value.name: Perpetual Access — Full Rights
value.description: Standard perpetual access with full online and download rights

fields.label: Access Model
fields.disclaimer: Term dates to be captured in OMS

sections.label: Time Window
sections.description: Configure time-based access constraints after subscription ends

fields.label: Grace Period
fields.description: Additional time allowed after subscription ends before access is revoked

sections.label: Usage Rights
sections.hint: Choose Allowed or Not-Allowed for each right.

fields.label: Concurrency Mode
fields.disclaimer: Limit to be captured in OMS (Concurrency will be applied only to DRM Content)

sections.label: AI Rights
sections.description: Configure reuse rights for AI purposes

sections.label: Non-AI Rights
sections.description: Configure reuse rights for non-AI purposes

get.summary: Get a Product Offering by code
get.description: Returns full offering detail with paginated slices. Each slice exposes: sliceId, sliceCategory, includedFormats, templateId, isDynamic, sliceName. rules and rightsConfig are not included in the response.

200.description: Full offering detail with paginated slices; each slice includes isDynamic, sliceName, sliceCategory, includedFormats, templateId

get.summary: Get contents of a specific slice

200.description: Paginated content item list for the slice

fieldErrors.description: Field-level validation errors — present only on HTTP 400

metadata.description: Additional context to help the caller self-correct (e.g. relevant resource IDs)
